title: OpenBookQA
description: Evolve the editable solver independently for each OpenBookQA validation science question, using the official additional split with the core supporting fact.
baseline_summary: A placeholder dataset-level solver template that returns the first available answer choice.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher accuracy is better across independently evolved OpenBookQA question runs.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the best answer string for the current open-book science question.
